overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit, industrial urban street at night. The scene features wet pavement reflecting orange and teal lights, with the character navigating under overpasses, past concrete barriers, and across a street intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street beneath elevated highway with digital billboards

events.description: red sports car passes by on the right side of the street
character begins turning left at the intersection ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the sidewalk beneath the industrial overpass, approaching the turn

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving past on the wet street

entered.detail: large metal highway overpass spanning the entire street with support beams
illuminated advertising screen showing video content suspended from the overpass
tall pole with bright orange sodium vapor light casting reflections on wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of an industrial urban street at night, dominated by a massive highway overpass overhead. Digital billboards hang from the structure, casting colorful light onto the wet concrete sidewalk. The character walks steadily forward as a red sports car passes by on the right, approaching an intersection where the path turns left.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial walkway lined with red and white concrete barriers

events.description: camera turns left to follow the character around the corner
construction worker in orange vest briefly passes close to camera on the left

agents.ego_description: turning left and walking along the barrier-lined path next to an industrial wall

notable_agents.action: construction worker in orange safety vest walking past the camera

entered.detail: red and white striped construction barriers lining the edge of the walkway
tall concrete wall with metal pipes, ladders, and industrial fixtures

segments.scene_description: The character turns left into a narrow industrial walkway flanked by red and white concrete barriers on the left and a tall industrial building wall on the right. A construction worker in an orange vest passes by closely. The overpass structure remains visible in the background as the camera follows the path alongside the barriers.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street approaching intersection with distant buildings visible

events.description: exiting the enclosed barrier area back onto the open street with sky visible

agents.ego_description: walking along the street approaching the intersection, with the character visible ahead in the distance

entered.detail: white painted zebra crossing stripes marking the pedestrian crossing ahead
tall buildings with illuminated windows visible in the distance through the haze

segments.scene_description: Exiting the narrow barrier-lined path, the scene opens up to a wider urban street with partial sky visibility. The character walks ahead toward a crosswalk, with distant skyscrapers visible through the hazy night air. The industrial overpass structure now appears on the left side as the camera advances toward the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection crosswalk with multiple pedestrians waiting and crossing

events.description: character stops at crosswalk waiting for traffic light to change
begins crossing the street with a group of pedestrians

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk then crossing the wide intersection with other pedestrians while cars pass by

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing crossing the street alongside the character
pedestrian in colorful outfit waiting at the corner then crossing

entered.detail: tall black pole with illuminated red traffic light and pedestrian signal
illuminated commercial sign on the corner building

segments.scene_description: The character reaches a wide intersection and stops at the crosswalk, waiting with other pedestrians. The traffic light pole stands prominently on the right. As the light changes, the character crosses the street with a group, navigating between passing cars. The wet asphalt reflects the surrounding neon lights, and the industrial overpass disappears from view behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street continuing past the intersection with parked vehicles

events.description: cars driving past on the wet street as the character continues walking

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past the intersection, moving away from the crosswalk

entered.detail: vehicles parked along the right curb of the street
large metal support structure for the elevated highway

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the character continues down the urban street. Parked cars line the right side of the road while the elevated highway support structure appears on the left. The camera follows steadily as vehicles drive past on the wet pavement, maintaining the neon-lit cyberpunk atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit industrial district that transitions from the shadow of a massive overpass to a wide, bustling urban intersection. It begins on a wet concrete sidewalk beneath a highway structure and digital billboards, moving forward as a red sports car passes before the character turns left. The scene then narrows into an industrial walkway flanked by concrete barriers and a tall building wall, passing a construction worker as the overpass recedes into the background. As the path opens up, the camera advances toward a hazy skyline and a wide crosswalk where the character pauses with other pedestrians before crossing the reflective asphalt between passing cars. Finally, the camera follows the character down a street lined with parked vehicles and elevated highway supports, maintaining the vibrant, rain-slicked cyberpunk atmosphere.
